title: dalea cylindrica var. samancoensis
intro: Dalea cylindrica var. samancoensis, a type of flowering plant, is a variant of the species Dalea cylindrica, commonly found in the mountainous regions of Iran. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Dalea cylindrica var. samancoensis include its ability to treat various ailments, such as wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues, due to its antimicrobial and antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in the form of infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, often used to treat digestive issues, colds, and other health concerns.
